title: Deliciously Caramelized Southern Thai Chicken Gaeng Curry
description: A citrusy and snappy Southern Thai dish featuring caramelized chicken and coconut flakes, perfect for a brunch mood, this curry is also FODMAP friendly.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the coconut flakes to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted, about 2 minutes.
Add the gaeng curry paste to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chicken back to the skillet and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve hot.
